tagline: Plan meals, manage your pantry, never overbuy.

form.guestHint: No email needed. Save your account anytime to keep your recipes safe.

legal.termsHint: Opens the Terms of use page

upgrade.headline: Keep your recipes.
upgrade.body: Add an email and password. Everything you've created as a guest stays attached to this account.

guestBranch.headline: Choose carefully.
guestBranch.intro: You have {{summary}} as a guest. What would you like to do?
guestBranch.saveTitle: Save my data → create new account
guestBranch.saveBody: Add an email and password on the next screen. Everything you've created stays attached.
guestBranch.abandonTitle: Sign in to my existing account
guestBranch.abandonBody: Your guest content will be deleted. This can't be undone.
guestBranch.deleteAlertBody: Signing into an existing account will permanently delete your {{summary}}. This can't be undone.

confirmEmail.bodySuffixSignUp: a link to confirm your email. Tap it from your inbox to finish signing up.
confirmEmail.bodySuffixUpgrade: a link to finish saving your account. Your guest data stays put until you click it.

alerts.emailTakenBody: It's already attached to another account. Sign in with it from a fresh session — your guest data won't transfer though.
alerts.restoreSuccessBody: Sign in to your RecipeGen account so we can attach the subscription to your profile.
alerts.restoreNothingBody: No past purchase was found on this Apple ID. If you bought RecipeGen on a different Apple ID, switch to it in iPhone Settings → Apple ID and try again.
alerts.restoreInactiveBody: We found a past purchase but it isn't currently active. Sign in to the RecipeGen account that owns the subscription, then try Restore again.

passwordHelper.sameAsOld: New password must differ from current

changePassword.headline: Change password.
changePassword.body: Confirm your current password, then pick a new one at least {{minLen}} characters.

alerts.rateLimitBody: Wait a few minutes before trying again.
alerts.networkBody: Couldn't reach our servers. Check your internet and try again.
alerts.wrongCurrentBody: Double-check the existing password you entered.
alerts.noEmailBody: Use Settings → Save my account to add an email first.

forgot.sentBodySuffix: a link to set a new password. It's good for one hour.
forgot.headline: No worries.
forgot.body: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send a link that lets you set a new password.

alerts.missingBody: Enter the email tied to your account.

reset.headline: Set a new password.
reset.body: Pick something at least {{minLen}} characters. You'll use it next time you sign in.

alerts.invalidLinkBody: This confirmation link is missing the auth token. Try requesting a new one.
